name: weavatrix
description: Code graph & blast-radius MCP server: change impact, transitive dependents, health audit, clone detection, coverage mapping over any local repository. Local-first.
long_description: Weavatrix builds a dependency graph of selected local repositories (tree-sitter WASM, no native toolchain) and serves it over MCP: change_impact, get_dependents, run_audit, find_duplicates, coverage_map, list_endpoints and more — 23 tools available, with 21 offline tools enabled by default. Repository retargeting is an explicit local tool call; the two network-capable tools remain a separate opt-in capability group.

repo_root.title: Repository to analyze
repo_root.description: The initial local Git repository. open_repo can switch to another repository through an explicit offline tool call; omit retarget from a custom capability list to pin this boundary.

capabilities.title: Capability groups
capabilities.description: Full comma-separated capability set; replaces the default. Allowed: graph,search,source,health,build,retarget,online. Pin one repo with graph,search,source,health,build; add online only when network tools are wanted.

sync_url.title: Optional graph sync endpoint
sync_url.description: Endpoint you configure and control. Used only when online is enabled and sync_graph is called.

sync_token.title: Optional graph sync token
sync_token.description: Bearer token sent only to the configured sync endpoint by sync_graph.
